_comment: deploy_info.json — Deployment contract. Generated by $deploy Phase 0.5 from source code. All fields sourced from: policy file, control config yaml, controller source, MJCF/URDF. Do not hand-fill — read from source.

joint_order.description: Action output index i corresponds to action_joint_list[i]. Order must match exactly.

rl_walk_params._source: Read from control config yaml — do not guess values
rl_walk_params._init_state_note: Per-joint initial position (rad) in action_joint_list order
rl_walk_params._stiffness_note: Kp per joint in action_joint_list order
rl_walk_params._damping_note: Kd per joint in action_joint_list order

walk_step_conf._decimation_note: Policy runs every decimation control steps (effective_policy_hz = control_hz / decimation)

lpf_conf._wc_note: Low-pass filter cutoff frequency (rad/s or Hz — match controller source)
lpf_conf._parallel_joints_note: Joints that use torque-mode (parallel linkage). These use tau_des = kp*(pos_des - q) + kd*(0 - dq) instead of position command.

observation_contract.description: Single-frame observation layout. Frames are stacked to form the full ONNX input.
observation_contract.stack_rule: history buffer = observations_size × num_hist; newest frame appended to tail

postprocess: Clamp pos_des[i] by joint_limits before low-pass filtering
Non-parallel joints: publish position command with stiffness[i] and damping[i]
Parallel joints (lpf_conf.parallel_joints): compute tau_des = kp * (pos_des - q) + kd * (0 - dq); publish torque command

sim2real_focus.goal: Use staged real-robot tests to identify which deployment-side parameters need adaptation without changing the trained policy first.

recommended_test_sequence.purpose: Verify IMU links, joint order, joint sign, zero offsets before enabling RL.
watch_items: Joint position sign matches intended positive direction
IMU orientation and angular velocity axes consistent with controller frame
joint_offset and actuator zeroing correct
Commanded forward/lateral/yaw inputs move robot in expected direction
primary_tuning_targets: ROS topic mapping or sensor frame alignment
recommended_test_sequence.pass_criteria: All sign checks pass, no topic errors, no unexpected motion on command

recommended_test_sequence.purpose: Verify zero → stand and hold stability before enabling RL walking.
watch_items: Overshoot during stand transition
High-frequency oscillation in hips, knees, ankles
Steady-state pose bias relative to desired stand posture
Motor heating or sustained high torque
recommended_test_sequence.pass_criteria: Robot stands stably for 30+ seconds with no oscillation, minimal drift

recommended_test_sequence.purpose: Enable rl_walk_leg with zero or very small velocity command; observe whether policy is calm.
watch_items: Whether cmd_threshold causes unintended stepping at zero command
Ankle chatter from torque-mode parallel joints
Action saturation or repeated clipping
Low-pass filter delay vs responsiveness
primary_tuning_targets: stiffness and damping for ankle and knee joints
recommended_test_sequence.pass_criteria: Policy runs calmly at zero command; small velocity command produces stable in-place motion or slow walking

recommended_test_sequence.purpose: Forward walking at conservative speed on flat ground.
watch_items: Step length too large or too small
Toe scuffing or insufficient foot clearance
Body pitch or roll drift
Velocity tracking lag
Left/right stance asymmetry
recommended_test_sequence.pass_criteria: Stable forward walking at target speed for 30+ seconds, no falls, acceptable gait pattern

recommended_test_sequence.purpose: Test y-axis and yaw commands after forward walking is stable.
watch_items: Unexpected coupling between yaw and roll
Lateral slip or strong upper-body compensation
Turning overshoot or understeer
recommended_test_sequence.pass_criteria: Robot responds to lateral and yaw commands without falling; motion is directionally correct

recommended_test_sequence.purpose: Mild pushes and varied floor surfaces after stable baseline walking.
watch_items: Recovery delay after push
Ankle saturation
Foot slap on landing
Instability after impact
recommended_test_sequence.pass_criteria: Robot recovers from 10–15N lateral push within 3 seconds; stable on carpet and tile

symptom_to_parameter_hints.symptom: Robot reacts too aggressively or step amplitude too large
Robot sluggish, drags feet, or fails to commit to step
Ankle torque joints feel unstable or vibrate under load
check: lpf_conf.wc not suitable for torque-mode path
calibration error — do not change unified parameters first
kp too high for this contact load
check command amplitude and contact conditions before increasing kp

parameter_adaptation_log._description: Append entries here when real-hardware testing requires parameter changes vs sim baseline. This log is the diff between sim and deployed config.
